message:
feat(overlays): improve focus management and autofocus support

Overlay.tsx improvements:
- Switch focus trap from useEffect to useLayoutEffect for earlier execution
- Add intelligent autofocus priority:
  1. Elements with data-overlay-autofocus attribute
  2. Elements with autofocus attribute
  3. First focusable element (button, input, etc.)
  4. Overlay container as fallback
- Removes closeOnEscape handling (now handled by keyboard system)

CommandPalette.tsx:
- Adds data-overlay-autofocus to search input
- Ensures input is focused immediately when palette opens

SwipeIndicators.tsx:
- Enhanced animation support for swipe gestures

These changes ensure keyboard-driven workflows (like command palette)
have proper focus on open, improving accessibility and UX.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
